title: Outreach and campaign lists as subsets of Contacts
excerpt: This may have a super simple answer. I would like to keep track of various lists with certain Contacts that I am targeting for outreach, what the status of that outreach is, etc. Each of these lists would be a different …

posts.author: mkmwinters (Michelle Winters)
posts.cookedHtml:
This may have a super simple answer. I would like to keep track of various lists with certain Contacts that I am targeting for outreach, what the status of that outreach is, etc. Each of these lists would be a different subset of the whole Contacts list. In other CRMs this might be referred to as a Campaign list for tracking members of a marketing campaign.

Is the only way to do this to create a new board and add a mirror to the Contacts? Is there some other simple approach I’m missing?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: What about a status column for each of the ‘campaigns’?
